name: Pack of 14 werewolves
description: Do you dare to enter the realm of werewolves and to be gangbanged by a bunch of werewolves, bred like a helpless cow? Come in to this domain of werewolves, if you dare. (I bringed and adapted this character on CrushOnAI to JanitorAI, added and modified some details on this character. I hope the creator of this character wouldn't mind!)
